evidence.title: README (segment 2)
README (segment 3)
evidence.excerpt:
The AI Orchestrator for 100x builders.
Run Claude Code, Codex, or OpenCode side-by-side across repos — each in its own worktree, tracked in one place.
Available for macOS, Windows, and Linux.

evidence.title: README (segment 6)
evidence.excerpt: Claude Code   Codex   Gemini   Pi   Hermes Agent   OpenCode

evidence.title: README (segment 7)
evidence.excerpt: - **No login required** — Bring your own Claude Code or Codex subscription. - **Worktree-native** — Every feature gets its own worktree. No stashing, no branch juggling. Spin up and switch instantly. - **Multi-agent terminals** — Run multiple AI agents side-by-side in tabs and panes. See which ones are active at a glance. - **Built-in source control** — Review AI-generated diffs, make quick edits, and commit without leaving Orca. - **GitHub integration** — PRs, issues, and Actions checks linked to each worktree automatically. - **Notifications** — Know when an agent finishes or needs attention. Mark threads unread to come back later.

evidence.title: README (segment 8)
evidence.excerpt: - **[Download from onOrca.dev](https://onOrca.dev)** - Or download the latest binaries via the **[GitHub Releases page](https://github.com/stablyai/orca/releases)**.

evidence.title: v1.1.23
evidence.excerpt: ## What's Changed * Fix active agent display: hide separator when empty, add quick-hide by @AmethystLiang in https://github.com/stablyai/orca/pull/555 * fix: reapply terminal shortcuts firing in wrong worktree by @brennanb2025 in https://github.com/stablyai/orca/pull/554 * Promote primary worktree to top when searching by repo name by @AmethystLiang in https://github.com/stablyai/orca/pull/557 **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/stablyai/orca/compare/v1.1.22...v1.1.23

evidence.title: v1.1.22
evidence.excerpt: ## What's Changed * fix: preserve terminal scroll position when splitting panes by @Jinwoo-H in https://github.com/stablyai/orca/pull/543 * fix: Cmd+X in rich markdown editor deletes only the current line by @AmethystLiang in https://github.com/stablyai/orca/pull/545 * Revert "fix: terminal shortcuts firing in wrong worktree" by @brennanb2025 in https://github.com/stablyai/orca/pull/546 * Revert "fix: preserve terminal sessions when switching worktrees" by @brennanb2025 in https://github.com/stablyai/orca/pull/547 * Revert "Start new worktrees with a terminal by default" by @brennanb2025 in https://github.com/stablyai/orca/pull/549 * Improve auto-updater changelog fallback and dismiss bypass by @AmethystLiang in https://github.com/stablyai/orca/pull/550 * Revert "Split-screen tab groups with canonical group/item model" by @brennanb2025 in https://github.com/stablyai/orca/pull/551 **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/stablyai/orca/compare/v1.1.21...v1.1.22

evidence.title: v1.1.21
evidence.excerpt: ## What's Changed * Start new worktrees with a terminal by default by @Jinwoo-H in https://github.com/stablyai/orca/pull/539 * fix: preserve terminal sessions when switching worktrees by @heyramzi in https://github.com/stablyai/orca/pull/535 * Add worktree creation to Cmd+J palette by @Jinwoo-H in https://github.com/stablyai/orca/pull/541 * fix: terminal shortcuts firing in wrong worktree by @Jinwoo-H in https://github.com/stablyai/orca/pull/542 **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/stablyai/orca/compare/v1.1.19...v1.1.21
